title: Remote Technology Strategy Manager
raw_jd:
Remote Technology Strategy Manager

Jobgether • Washington, DC (Remote)


This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Remote AVP, Technology Strategy and Operations. This key leadership role is responsible for providing visionary and operational guidance within a technology-focused organization. By fostering cross-functional collaboration and implementing strategic initiatives, the AVP will ensure that technology efforts align with critical organizational objectives. The role involves creating a unified technology roadmap, managing multi-workstream programs, and enhancing operational efficiencies. This position plays a pivotal part in transforming and modernizing technology strategies to support mission-driven objectives, with significant impact on community health and wellness.

Accountabilities

    Develop and maintain an integrated Technology–Product roadmap aligned to strategic initiatives.
    Lead enterprise-wide technology programs across multiple teams and functions.
    Design and implement a unified intake process for technology requests.
    Facilitate coordination among various technology leadership teams.
    Prepare executive-level technology communications and presentations.

Requirements

    Minimum 10 years of experience in strategy, operations, or program leadership roles.
    Proven track record in developing and executing technology strategies.
    Strong leadership experience in cross-organizational settings.
    Expertise in program governance and compliance frameworks.
    Exceptional ability to communicate complex technical information.

Benefits

    Competitive salary range: $180,000 - $200,000.
    Comprehensive benefits including medical, dental, and vision.
    401K plan available for full-time employees.
    Flexible work environment with remote opportunities.
    Support for professional development and training.

Why Apply Through Jobgether?

We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.

We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!

Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

Benefits found in job post

401(k)

score.skills_rationale: Strong alignment with candidate's technology strategy, program management, and cross-functional leadership experience. The role requires technology roadmap development, enterprise program leadership, and executive communications - all areas where candidate has deep experience from VA FMBT, Howard University CFO reporting, and consulting roles.
score.scope_rationale: The AVP level and enterprise-wide program leadership expectations align well with candidate's senior architect and direct-to-CFO experience. However, the role emphasizes more pure strategy/operations management versus the candidate's strong technical hands-on background, creating a slight scope mismatch.
score.pay_rationale: Salary range of $180K-$200K is at the lower end of candidate's W2 target range ($160K-$220K), representing acceptable but not optimal compensation alignment.
red_flags: Third-party recruiter with unnamed client company
Vague job description lacking specific technical requirements
AI-powered matching process disclaimer suggests high volume/low touch recruitment
score.bullshit_reason: Posted by third-party recruiter (Jobgether) for unnamed 'partner company' with generic job description and heavy emphasis on AI screening process. This suggests a staffing firm posting rather than direct employer opportunity.
score.raw_analysis: This appears to be a legitimate AVP-level technology strategy role with good skills alignment, but significant red flags around the recruiting process. The unnamed client company, generic job description, and third-party posting suggest this may be a volume recruiting play rather than a targeted opportunity. While the compensation and scope are reasonable matches, the lack of transparency and recruiter-mediated process warrant caution.

cover_letters.content:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to express my strong interest in the AVP, Technology Strategy and Operations role. With 25+ years of experience leading enterprise technology transformations and currently serving as Senior Data & Analytics Architect for the Department of Veterans Affairs' $2.6B Financial Management Business Transformation program, I bring the exact combination of strategic vision and operational execution this position requires. At VA, I have designed integrated technology roadmaps spanning legacy system modernization, ERP implementation, and data architecture—directly aligning with your need for unified technology-product roadmap development.

My track record demonstrates proven capability in cross-organizational leadership and enterprise program management. At Howard University, I served as one of three key drivers of a multi-million-dollar Workday ERP implementation, coordinating across Finance, HR, and IT stakeholders during a period of executive disruption. I successfully stabilized delivery, resolved complex system integration challenges, and drove the program to successful deployment. This experience directly translates to your requirements for leading enterprise-wide technology programs and facilitating coordination among technology leadership teams. Additionally, my role required regular executive communications to the Deputy CFO and C-suite leadership, preparing strategic presentations and technology assessments.

Throughout my career, I have consistently bridged the gap between technical complexity and business strategy. As a BI Partner serving multiple clients, I delivered data platforms and analytics solutions while mentoring engineering teams and establishing governance frameworks. My early experience at MicroStrategy, where I led engineering teams and delivered integrated analytics systems that saved $312K annually, demonstrates my ability to drive operational efficiencies at scale. This combination of hands-on technical expertise and strategic program leadership positions me to immediately contribute to your technology modernization objectives.

I am particularly drawn to this role's mission-driven focus and the opportunity to transform technology strategies that impact community health and wellness. My experience designing enterprise-wide systems, implementing governance frameworks, and leading cross-functional initiatives aligns perfectly with your organizational needs. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my proven track record can drive your technology strategy forward.

Sincerely,
Salil Maniktahla

Dear Hiring Manager,

Your search for an AVP of Technology Strategy and Operations reflects a critical challenge many organizations face today: how to transform scattered technology initiatives into a unified, mission-driven strategy. My 25+ years architecting and leading complex technology transformations—from the VA's $1B+ FMBT program to Howard University's enterprise ERP implementation—have taught me that successful technology strategy requires both visionary roadmap development and hands-on operational execution.

At the Department of Veterans Affairs, I've spent three years leading data architecture and reporting workstreams for one of the largest federal ERP modernizations, directly experiencing the complexities of coordinating enterprise-wide technology programs across multiple stakeholders. This role required me to develop integrated technology solutions while managing cross-functional teams spanning Finance, IT, and Acquisition—precisely the type of coordination your AVP role demands. Similarly, at Howard University, I served as one of three key drivers (Finance, HR, IT) during a multi-million-dollar Workday implementation, helping stabilize delivery during executive disruption and driving the program to successful deployment. These experiences have shown me how critical it is to translate complex technical initiatives into clear executive communications while maintaining operational momentum.

What draws me to this opportunity is the mission-driven focus on community health and wellness—an environment where technology strategy must directly serve human outcomes. My background designing audit-ready data architectures, establishing governance frameworks, and building enterprise reporting systems positions me well to develop the unified technology roadmap and intake processes your organization needs. I understand that an AVP role requires moving beyond technical implementation to strategic orchestration, and my experience coordinating across diverse stakeholders while maintaining hands-on technical credibility would enable me to bridge the gap between visionary strategy and practical execution.

I'd welcome the opportunity to discuss how my experience transforming complex technology landscapes can contribute to your organization's mission-driven objectives.

Sincerely,
Salil Maniktahla

I am writing to express my interest in the AVP, Technology Strategy and Operations role. With 25+ years of experience leading complex technology initiatives, I have consistently delivered enterprise-wide programs that align technical capabilities with strategic objectives. Most recently, I've led data architecture and reporting for the VA's $multi-billion FMBT program, designing integrated technology roadmaps that span legacy systems, modern ERP platforms, and executive reporting needs. At Howard University, I served as a key cross-functional leader during their Workday ERP implementation, coordinating across Finance, HR, and IT stakeholders while establishing data governance frameworks and enterprise BI architecture.

My experience directly matches your core requirements: developing unified technology roadmaps (VA FMBT integration architecture), leading enterprise programs across multiple teams (Howard University ERP implementation), and preparing executive-level communications (direct reporting to Deputy CFO). I excel at translating complex technical initiatives into strategic business outcomes, whether designing audit-ready data reconciliation systems for federal financial operations or building KPI frameworks that drive executive decision-making. I'm particularly drawn to mission-driven technology work and would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my proven track record in enterprise technology strategy can support your organization's objectives.

tailored_resume:
SALIL MANIKTAHLA
Springfield, VA  ·  571-215-8218  ·  salil.maniktahla@gmail.com  ·  linkedin.com/in/salilmaniktahla

SUMMARY

Technology strategy and program leader with 25+ years driving enterprise technology roadmaps, leading cross-functional initiatives, and delivering executive-level communications across complex organizational environments. Currently architecting technology solutions for the Department of Veterans Affairs' Financial Management Business Transformation program, managing multi-workstream technology implementations that align with strategic organizational objectives.

Proven expertise in developing integrated technology-product roadmaps, leading enterprise-wide programs across multiple teams, and establishing unified governance frameworks. Known for translating complex technical strategies into actionable executive communications and fostering cross-organizational collaboration to drive mission-critical technology modernization efforts.

CORE CAPABILITIES

Technology Strategy & Roadmap Development
    • Enterprise technology-product roadmap design aligned to strategic initiatives
    • Technology modernization strategies supporting mission-driven objectives
    • Cross-functional technology program leadership and coordination

Program Leadership & Operations
    • Multi-workstream program management across enterprise environments
    • Technology request intake processes and governance frameworks
    • Executive-level technology communications and presentations

Cross-Organizational Leadership
    • Technology leadership team coordination and collaboration
    • Strategic initiative alignment across Finance, IT, and Operations
    • Stakeholder management and executive reporting

Data Platforms & Engineering
    • Data pipelines, ETL/ELT, system integration and technology implementation
    • ERP technology integration and enterprise platform rollouts

Infrastructure & Systems
    • Technology architecture, distributed systems, and operational efficiency design

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Senior Data & Analytics Architect (Contractor)
U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs – FMBT	Sep 2021 – Present

    • Lead technology strategy and operations for Financial Management Business Transformation program, developing integrated technology roadmaps supporting VA's enterprise modernization objectives
    • Coordinate enterprise-wide technology programs across multiple teams including Finance, Acquisition, and IT stakeholders
    • Prepare and deliver executive-level technology communications and presentations for CFO-level visibility and strategic decision-making
    • Design and implement unified technology processes for data integration, system rollouts, and operational coordination
    • Manage multi-workstream technology initiatives integrating legacy systems with modern ERP platforms
    • Facilitate cross-functional collaboration to ensure technology efforts align with critical organizational objectives

Business Intelligence Analyst – Finance
Howard University	Apr 2020 – Jul 2024

    • Provided technology strategy leadership as one of three key drivers in multi-million-dollar Workday ERP implementation during executive transition period
    • Led enterprise technology program coordination across Finance, HR, and IT functions during period of organizational disruption
    • Developed and maintained integrated technology-product roadmaps aligned to university strategic initiatives
    • Designed unified technology governance frameworks and data management policies across enterprise systems
    • Prepared executive-level technology communications reporting directly to CFO and Deputy CFO
    • Established cross-organizational coordination processes improving technology program delivery and operational efficiency

BI Partner / Strategist (Independent Consultant)
Multiple Clients	Jul 2016 – Mar 2020

    • Delivered technology strategy and operations consulting across multiple enterprise clients and industries
    • Led technology program implementations aligned with governance frameworks and organizational objectives
    • Developed integrated technology roadmaps supporting business transformation and modernization initiatives
    • Facilitated cross-functional technology leadership coordination and strategic planning sessions
    • Mentored technology teams and supported organizational capability development across technical and strategic domains

VitalSpring Technologies
BI Senior Manager	May 2008 – Jul 2009

    • Served as technology program leader managing enterprise analytics initiatives and cross-organizational technology strategy
    • Developed technology-product roadmaps identifying operational improvements, delivering $70K+ in savings within 6 months
    • Led cross-functional technology teams through strategic initiative delivery and program coordination

EARLIER EXPERIENCE

Senior BI Consultant – Claraview (Teradata), 2006–2008
    • Technology strategy architect for enterprise-wide platform supporting 25,000 users (Lowe's); developed strategic technology frameworks for Fortune 100 client

BI Consultant – Kinetic Networks, 2005–2006
    • Delivered technology strategy solutions for Google, Yahoo, Wells Fargo supporting enterprise modernization objectives

IT Specialist – U.S. Environmental Protection Agency, 2002–2005
    • Led technology strategy development for National Center for Environmental Economics; managed cross-functional team of 6 supporting mission-driven technology objectives

Operations Manager – MicroStrategy, 1999–2001
    • Led technology operations teams; developed integrated technology strategies; delivered operational improvements saving ~$312K/year through strategic vendor optimization

SELECTED SYSTEMS & INNOVATION

    • Designed enterprise-level technology architecture combining strategic roadmap development with operational implementation
    • Built integrated technology governance frameworks supporting cross-organizational program coordination
    • Developed technology strategy communications and executive reporting systems across distributed organizational environments
    • Designed technology modernization initiatives supporting mission-driven objectives and operational transformation

TECHNICAL SKILLS

Technology Strategy: Enterprise roadmaps, technology-product alignment, strategic initiative coordination
Program Management: Multi-workstream leadership, governance frameworks, executive communications
Data & Analytics: SQL, Python, ETL/ELT, Data Modeling, Technology Integration
Platforms: Enterprise systems integration, ERP implementations, cross-organizational technology coordination
Infrastructure: Technology architecture, distributed systems, operational efficiency design
Cloud: Azure (enterprise services), technology modernization strategies

CERTIFICATIONS & EDUCATION

B.A., Washington University in St. Louis
CISSP  ·  Certified Scrum Master  ·  Tableau Certified Professional  ·  MicroStrategy Certified Developer
